Stylidocleome brachycarpa is a specific species within this family, classified according to its unique characteristics and taxonomic features.

intro:
There is not enough information available about the plant Stylidocleome brachycarpa. However, I can provide information on Stilbeo Clitorea or more commonly known as Stilbeo cleome. 

Stilbeo Cleome (Cleome brachycarpa) is a plant species that belongs to the Cleomaceae family. It is an annual herb known for its potential medicinal properties. 

Cleome brachycarpa has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Cleome brachycarpa include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal effects.

The most common herbal preparations made with Cleome brachycarpa include decoctions, infusions, and powders, often used to treat colds, coughs, and sore throats.
